task_completion.description: Verify a Production record is created for the target product with the correct quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the iDempiere 'Production' window, look for a record where the Product field is 'Patio Set' and the Production Quantity is 5.

task_completion.description: Verify the production date is set to today's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Movement Date or Production Date field in the Production header. It should match the current date of the system/task execution.

task_completion.description: Verify the Patio Chair component is included with the correct quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Production Plan or Production Line tab, look for a line item with the Product 'Patio Chair' and a quantity (Movement Quantity or Qty Used) of 20.

task_completion.description: Verify the Patio Table component is included with the correct quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Production Plan or Production Line tab, look for a line item with the Product 'Patio Table' and a quantity (Movement Quantity or Qty Used) of 5.

task_completion.description: Verify the Production record is processed/completed to update inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Document Status of 'Completed' (or a greyed-out/read-only record indicating it has been processed) in the Production window, confirming the inventory levels were updated as requested.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the iDempiere web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web interface (menus, tabs, toolbars) rather than terminal commands, SQL queries, or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the record was created in the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs should be within standard iDempiere form fields, not written in a text editor, spreadsheet, or standalone document.

integrity.description: Verify the UI does not show signs of HTML manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Fonts, alignments, and field layouts should be consistent with the standard iDempiere theme without obvious visual artifacts or mismatched text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Product: 'Patio Set'. Target Quantity: 5. Component 1: 'Patio Chair' (Quantity: 20). Component 2: 'Patio Table' (Quantity: 5). The task is performed in the iDempiere ERP system. To successfully increase/decrease inventory as requested, the Production document must be processed/completed.
